input_natural_language: The autopilot shall change states from NOMINAL to MANEUVER when the sensor data is not good.
explanation: The LTL formula captures the requirement that when the sensor data is not good (i.e., !good), the autopilot changes states from NOMINAL to MANEUVER. This is represented as: G(!good -> (state_is_NOMINAL -> X(state_is_MANEUVER))). It means globally, if the sensor data is not good, then if the state is NOMINAL, the next state will be MANEUVER.
decision3: at the next timepoint satisfy bool_exp3
decision1_substring: when the sensor data is not good
output_structured_natural_language: whenever !good, whenever state_is_NOMINAL, at the next timepoint satisfy state_is_MANEUVER
